title: HUD-Refined
description: A texture/recource pack that changes your HUD; hearts, armor points, hotbar, experience bar, etc..
body:
# HUD-Refined
![Vanilla & HUD-Refined difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626b796761ed07551d54daa33aa4868b2f6e0d6d.png)

### This resource pack completely reworks core HUD elements: hearts, hunger, armor, experience bar, air bubbles, and more to give your interface an unique look and feel that stands out from vanilla. This pack enhances how your game’s interface looks without changing blocks or mobs, making each play session feel fresh and visually appealing.
-----------------------------------------
### Mod support
- [AppleCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applecore)
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Armor Chroma](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-chroma-for-fabric)
- [Custom Health Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-health-bar)
- [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
